title: Datadog Monitor Inventory
proves: Custom monitors were designed around synthetic validation and source health.

title: Synthetic Log Replay
proves: Replay events carry source:test-harness and synthetic:true boundaries.

title: Identity Account Takeover Triage
proves: The account takeover detection has a repeatable analyst workflow.

proves: Endpoint and data-access context are correlated into a single alert story.

title: Command Center Overview Screenshot
proves: The public-safe dashboard presents KPIs, ATT&CK coverage, active scenarios, signal stream, and validation path.

title: Detection Lifecycle Screenshot
proves: The monitor inventory is presented as detection lifecycle evidence with query scope and detection-as-code context.

title: Scenario Walkthrough Screenshot
proves: Threat scenarios are mapped to kill-chain stage, trigger, triage, outcome, and evidence reference.

title: Mobile Dashboard Screenshot
proves: The command-center dashboard remains usable on a narrow reviewer viewport.
